message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Project scaffolding: Cargo.toml, src structure, docker-compose, and configuration","description":"Set up the foundational project structure:
- Create Cargo.toml with all dependencies from TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md initial crate list (axum, tokio, sqlx, askama, serde, tracing, thiserror, anyhow, argon2, tower-sessions, uuid, etc.)
- Create the src/ directory structure per TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md: main.rs, lib.rs, configuration.rs, startup.rs, routes/, domain/, services/, infrastructure/, templates/
- Create docker-compose.yml for PostgreSQL
- Create configuration files (base.yaml, local.yaml)
- Create tests/ directory structure with api/ and helpers
- Ensure cargo build compiles, cargo fmt passes, cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
- Add sqlx, docker-compose, and other needed tools to flake.nix buildInputs","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-08T20:24:01.416Z"}
</teammate-message>
